Cloud Mountain

Family EcoCamps

for Families with Kids over 5 years old

Every summer and winter holidays we organize fun, educational programs for families interested in experiencing and learning about the unique nature, culture and sustainable development in Yunnan province, China.

Upcoming EcoCamp

Winter 2026 Family EcoCamp

Join us on our Yunnan Snub-nosed Monkey Conservation Journey across the beautiful Yunnan regions of Naxi Lijiang and Tibetan Shangri-La.
Learn More

Highlights

Fun & Educational

Spend an unforgetable and rewarding summer holiday with your family.

Monkey Conservation

Observe Yunnan Golden Monkey in its natural habitat, and support its conservation.

Ethnic Minorities

Discover the unique Naxi, Yi, Lisu and Tibetan ethnic minority cultures.

Natural Wonders

Explore diverse ecosystems, biodiversity hotspots and natural wonders of Yunnan.

Sustainability

Visit our project sites and learn first-hand about sustainable development.
